title: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam
tagline: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam, Kerala

overview.short: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: Champakulam Kalloorkadu St. Mary's Syro Malabar Catholic Basilica Church (Malayalam: ചമ്പക്കുളം വലിയ പള്ളി) is an ancient Christian Church in Kerala. It belongs to the Syro-Malabar Church under the Archeparchy of Changanacherry. It is a Forane church, with several parishes under it.

topPlaces.name: Champakulam
topPlaces.description: Champakulam is a village in Kerala, India. It is in Alappuzha district.

topPlaces.name: Pulinkunnu
topPlaces.description: Pulinkunnu is a small village in the Kuttanadu region of Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. The Pampa river in Pulincunnoo is a route for houseboat tourism operators in Kuttanadu.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Forane Church, Pulinkunnoo
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Syro Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Pulinkunnoo is a Catholic church located in Alappuzha district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Vaisyambhagom
topPlaces.description: Vaisyambhagom is a village in Kuttanadu Taluk in Alleppey District in Kerala. River Pookaitha, a branch of River Pamba flows on the north and west side of the village.

topPlaces.name: Koduppunna
topPlaces.description: Koduppunna is a small village in kuttanad region of Alappuzha district in Kerala. It lies 2 km away from the Alappuzha- Changanacherry road.

topPlaces.name: Monkombu
topPlaces.description: Mankombu or Moncombu is a village in the district of Alappuzha in the state of Kerala, India. Monkombu, part of the Kuttanad delta region popularly mentioned as 'Rice bowl of Kerala'; is one of the major paddy cultivation regions of the state.

topPlaces.name: Rice Research Station, Moncombu
topPlaces.description: Rice Research Station, Moncombu, is a research Station under the Special Zone of Problem Areas of Kerala Agricultural University at Moncombu in Alappuzha district of Kerala, India. In 2013, The Centre for Rice Germplasm of this Rice Research Station, has developed new rice varieties with reduced harvesting cycle and increased pest and disease resistance to fight climate change.

topPlaces.name: Nedumudi
topPlaces.description: Nedumudi is a village in the Alappuzha district of the Indian state of Kerala. It is the birthplace of Malayalam actor Nedumudi Venu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (64 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Champakulam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Champakulam, Pulinkunnu, St. Mary's Forane Church, Pulinkunnoo, Vaisyambhagom, Koduppunna.
